description: One DefiLlama gateway over x402 covering protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics, multi-chain current & historical token prices with charts, and DeFi pool yields/APY. Key-free decision data for agents doing DeFi research, capital allocation, pricing and risk screening. Data by DefiLlama.

endpoints.description: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocols`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /protocols
zh-CN.title: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /protocols
endpoints.title: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs all protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown through the defillama-tvl-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocol/{slug}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

zh-CN.title: Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /protocol/{slug}

endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata through the defillama-tvl-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)

endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated) through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关聚合 DefiLlama 数据:协议 TVL、费用/收入与稳定币指标、多链现价与历史价格及图表、DeFi 资金池收益率/APY。免 key,适合 Agent 做 DeFi 研究、资金配置、定价与风险筛查。数据来自 DefiLlama。
zh-CN.subtitle: 聚合 DeFi 数据:协议 TVL、费用与稳定币、多链代币价格、资金池收益率/APY。
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama 数据
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Aggregated DeFi data - protocol TVL, fees & stablecoins, multi-chain token prices, and pool yields/APY.
subtitle: Aggregated DeFi data - protocol TVL, fees & stablecoins, multi-chain token prices, and pool yields/APY.
title: DefiLlama
use_case: Use to read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics for DeFi research, allocation or risk screening.
